articles.title: ByteDance reportedly pauses global launch of its Seedance 2.0 video generator

articles.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
articles.description: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving

articles.title: Unacademy to be acquired by upGrad in share-swap deal as India’s edtech sector consolidates
articles.description: The deal comes after Unacademy’s valuation plunged from $3.5B to under $500M, as India’s once-booming edtech sector struggles.
